Manufacturing test applications and headers for Bluetooth, display, flash, battery, and button tests in Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[mfg_app_registry.h](mfg_app_registry.h.md)**: Registers manufacturing test applications and their initialization functions for Pebble firmware.
- **[mfg_bt_test_app.c](mfg_bt_test_app.c.md)**: A Bluetooth test application for Pebble firmware, managing Bluetooth states and user interactions.
- **[mfg_bt_test_app.h](mfg_bt_test_app.h.md)**: Header file for retrieving metadata of the Bluetooth test manufacturing app.
- **[mfg_display_burnin.c](mfg_display_burnin.c.md)**: Implements a display burn-in test application for Pebble devices with a checkerboard pattern.
- **[mfg_display_burnin.h](mfg_display_burnin.h.md)**: Defines functions to get application information and UUID for the display burn-in manufacturing app.
- **[mfg_flash_test.c](mfg_flash_test.c.md)**: Implements flash memory test functions for parallel flash hardware, including data, address, stress, and performance tests.
- **[mfg_flash_test.h](mfg_flash_test.h.md)**: Defines enums and functions for running and managing flash test cases in firmware.
- **[mfg_func_test_battery.h](mfg_func_test_battery.h.md)**: Defines functions and data structures for a manufacturing battery function test in the Pebble firmware.
- **[mfg_func_test_black.h](mfg_func_test_black.h.md)**: Functions for managing a manufacturing function test window with button interactions in Pebble firmware.
- **[mfg_func_test_buttons.h](mfg_func_test_buttons.h.md)**: Defines structures and functions for manufacturing functional testing of button inputs.
- **[mfg_func_test_version.h](mfg_func_test_version.h.md)**: Implements a version display window for manufacturing function tests with button interaction handling.
